_comment: Skill-install template. Restaurant info comes from the owner via Telegram onboarding → restaurant-profile.json. Every external call goes through the per-agent Composio MCP server. {{AGENT_HOME}} is replaced by install.sh with the agent's data dir (~/agents/<agent>/social-marketing). Telegram is configured inside Hermes itself via 'hermes setup' — not here.

composio._comment: apiKey: your Composio project API key. defaultUserId: per-agent identifier used for most toolkits (e.g. 'rodolfino-marketing'). userIdOverrides: only fill in if a specific toolkit needs a different userId — Composio sometimes forces splits (e.g. OpenAI on its own userId, or OpenRouter separate from OAuth toolkits). Add overrides as you discover them. Toolkit slugs match Composio's: 'openai', 'openrouter', 'gmail', 'googledrive', 'instagram', 'facebook', 'tiktok'. mcpServerUrls is filled in by setup.js — leave blank.

imageGen._comment: Optional escape hatch: pin a specific Composio tool slug if MCP discovery picks the wrong one. Default leaves it blank and lets generate-slides.js find an OpenAI image-generation tool by pattern.

research._comment: Override the model used by weekly-research.js. Default: perplexity/sonar (web search built in). Routed through OPENROUTER_CHAT_COMPLETIONS via Composio MCP.

posting._comment: schedule: array of HH:MM (24h, local timezone) when auto-post fires. Add multiple for lunch+dinner posts. autoPost.enabled toggles the whole feature; .paused is set by /pause and /resume slash commands; .lastPostedAt and .consecutiveFailures are written by auto-post.js — leave blank initially.
